items.md: Barks, interview by Ault and Andrae, August 4, 1975. The comic strip adventures of Alex Raymond's *Flash Gordon*, Hal Foster's *Prince Valiant*, and Roy Crane's *Buzz Sawyer* and *Wash Tubbs* and the humorous adventure tales of E. C. Segar's *Popeye* were also very influential. Indeed, the Popeye strip adventure featuring detective Merlock Jones (August 1932) inspired the quick-change artist in Barks's Donald Duck tale *Big Top Bedlam* (DD FC #300 [1950]).
